category.scope_note: Hand-held, transportable, and garden electric or cordless power tools exported from China to the Sultanate of Oman, covering electrical safety, EMC, market access, noise, restricted substances, and battery obligations.

title.en: China-to-Oman Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入阿曼：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入阿曼：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Oman MOCIIP and DGSM conformity, GSO/IEC electrical safety, EMC, TRA radio approval, noise treatment, restricted substances, and battery requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与阿曼 MOCIIP 及 DGSM 符合性评定、GSO/IEC 电气安全、电磁兼容、TRA 无线电核准、噪声处理、限用物质及电池要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與阿曼 MOCIIP 及 DGSM 符合性評定、GSO/IEC 電氣安全、電磁相容、TRA 無線電核准、噪聲處理、限用物質及電池要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment body assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Omani law, GSO standards, DGSM conformity requirements, TRA type approval, and destination-country enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行阿曼法律、GSO 标准、DGSM 符合性要求、TRA 型号核准及目的国执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行阿曼法律、GSO 標準、DGSM 符合性要求、TRA 型號核准及目的國執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Oman, the mandatory baseline is conformity with applicable GSO standards (which adopt IEC 62841) verified through Oman national conformity managed by MOCIIP and the DGSM, plus TRA type approval for any cordless tool with a wireless or radio module; GSO/IEC 62841 is the technical reference, and Oman has no EU-style outdoor-noise product marking scheme.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入阿曼，强制基线是符合适用 GSO 标准（采纳 IEC 62841），并通过 MOCIIP 与 DGSM 管理的阿曼国家符合性评定加以验证，凡带无线或射频模块的无绳工具还须取得 TRA 型号核准；GSO/IEC 62841 为技术参照，阿曼没有欧盟式的户外噪声产品标识制度。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入阿曼，強制基線是符合適用 GSO 標準（採納 IEC 62841），並通過 MOCIIP 與 DGSM 管理的阿曼國家符合性評定加以驗證，凡帶無線或射頻模組的無繩工具還須取得 TRA 型號核准；GSO/IEC 62841 為技術參照，阿曼沒有歐盟式的戶外噪聲產品標識制度。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator, standards body, conformity-assessment body, customs, or primary legal source preferred.
